task_description: Implement wake word detection (Hey Quant) with on-device processing, privacy lamp controller, audio buffer log with forget/star, and privacy audit system for the @quant/quant-live package

verification.summary: Typecheck passes with 0 errors. All 160 tests pass across 23 test files (29 new tests in 4 new test files). Tests exercise real detection logic, ring buffer behavior, state transitions, and immutability constraints.
